findings.design_reference: T034/T034b; specs/198-beta2-hardening/iterations/003/design-analysis.md integration-api, observability-resilience, and code-implementation lenses; FR-012/FR-017/NFR-006
findings.comment: HUMAN DECISION REQUIRED: final-round verification confirms the prior blocking issue remains unresolved. Explicitly supplied DesignContextFiles are still accepted as-is at line 568, without per-entry resolution, so mixed/all-invalid refs can reach reviewer-host selection instead of failing before selection with design-context-unresolved: and status unresolved_design_context; no paired reviewer-never-invoked tests exist. The worktree-visible state.md lines 323-346 and 383-385 explicitly call T034b pending/open and awaiting maintainer direction; that is not a human-approved deferral and names no carry destination. Stop the autonomous review/fix loop and have the maintainer either implement the strict T034b seam plus paired tests or record a qualifying visible deferral with approver and carry destination.
